content: libphonenumber-js: parsePhoneNumberFromString(input, 'BR') parses a Brazilian number and returns a PhoneNumber object; .number gives E.164 format (e.g. '+5511999999999'); .isValid() checks validity. For wa.me links the leading '+' must be stripped and no other formatting characters kept — normalize once at save time in the store-settings form, store only the digits-only E.164 form.
